title: delphinium omeiense var. pubescens
intro: Delphinium omeiense var. pubescens, also known as the Sichuan delphinium, is a variety of the Delphinium omeiense plant, which is native to China. This plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Delphinium omeiense var. pubescens include its ability to reduce fever, relieve coughs and respiratory issues, and alleviate skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
